name: Intrust Funding
description_short: Intrust Funding is a credit repair provider based in Bellevue, Washington. Rated 4.9/5 with 84 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Intrust Funding is a credit repair provider serving clients in Bellevue, Washington. Carrying a 4.9/5.0 Google rating from 84 reviews, Intrust Funding has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Bellevue area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a loan agency, financial institution, investment service, Intrust Funding provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Bellevue, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Intrust Funding operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Bellevue, Washington area who are considering Intrust Funding should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
